# format: html5-dompatch-v2
# status: active

Batch index=0 size=17
CreateDocument key=1 doctype=<none>
CreateElement key=2 ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=3
CreateElement key=4 ns=html local="style" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=3 child=4
CreateText key=5 text="body{content:\"</stylex><\\\\/style>\";}"
AppendChild parent=4 child=5
CreateElement key=6 ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=6
CreateElement key=7 ns=html local="div" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=6 child=7
CreateElement key=8 ns=html local="em" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=7 child=8
CreateText key=9 text="ok"
AppendChild parent=8 child=9
